EventData.Data: schtasks /create /tn "WindowsUpdateCheck" /tr "powershell.exe -WindowStyle Hidden -Command Write-Host pwned" /sc onlogon /ru SYSTEM

RenderingInfo.Message: Process Create: RuleName: - UtcTime: 2026-06-17 17:30:14.941 ProcessGuid: {774a23fa-d9a6-6a32-e401-000000000c00} ProcessId: 5192 Image: C:\Windows\System32\schtasks.exe FileVersion: 10.0.19041.906 (WinBuild.160101.0800) Description: Task Scheduler Configuration Tool Product: Microsoft® Windows® Operating System Company: Microsoft Corporation OriginalFileName: schtasks.exe CommandLine: schtasks /create /tn "WindowsUpdateCheck" /tr "powershell.exe -WindowStyle Hidden -Command Write-Host pwned" /sc onlogon /ru SYSTEM CurrentDirectory: C:\Windows\system32\ User: WINDOWS10-TARGE\harry LogonGuid: {774a23fa-9810-6a32-37a4-040000000000} LogonId: 0x4A437 TerminalSessionId: 1 IntegrityLevel: High Hashes: MD5=796B784E98008854C27F4B18D287BA30,SHA256=356280CCA63CA5E887FDBE5CB4105A53341FBAC9219EFC51621DF9BA8EE9838B,IMPHASH=ECCE05491F2E8F279F4790BCB1318C05 ParentProcessGuid: {774a23fa-d370-6a32-bc01-000000000c00} ParentProcessId: 5532 ParentImage: C:\Windows\System32\cmd.exe ParentCommandLine: "C:\Windows\system32\cmd.exe" ParentUser: WINDOWS10-TARGE\harry
